meta.title: FAQ — streetwave®
meta.description: Answers to common questions about customization, timelines, payment, and shipping.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions. Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to us.

items.q: How long does a custom take?
items.a: Typically 2–4 weeks depending on complexity. Rush orders can be discussed individually.
Sneakers, jackets, denim jackets, bags, helmets, skateboards, and other objects. If it can be worn or displayed — we can customize it.

items.q: Can I send my own item?
items.a: Yes, you can send your own sneakers, clothing, or objects. We can also source base items if needed.
50% upfront after sketch approval, the remaining balance before shipping. We accept PayPal and bank transfers.
Yes, we offer worldwide shipping with tracking and insurance.
We use professional Angelus paints and protective coatings. With proper care, the custom lasts for years.

items.q: Can I actually wear custom sneakers?
items.a: Absolutely. All our work is fully functional. We use flexible paints and finishes designed to withstand regular wear.

items.q: What is the minimum order for limited editions?
items.a: Minimum quantities are discussed on a case-by-case basis. We work with both one-off pieces and runs starting from 10 units.
Yes, all brand projects are formalized with a contract that includes fixed timelines, a detailed budget, and mutual obligations.

items.q: What's included in a custom zone at an event?
items.a: Artist(s) on-site, consumable materials, equipment, and branded zone setup. Format and scale are tailored to your budget.

items.q: What are the timelines for brand projects?
items.a: It depends on scale: from 2 weeks for small collaborations to 2 months for large-scale projects.

items.q: Can I get a quote before signing a contract?
items.a: Yes, we prepare a preliminary estimate after discussing the brief. It's free and comes with no obligations.
Our studio is based in Moscow. We work with clients worldwide.
Telegram @streetwave, email hello@streetwave.studio, or via the contact form on our website. We respond within 24 hours.

items.q: Do you have a shop with ready-made pieces?
items.a: Our online shop is in development. Follow us on social media for updates.
